nodes.label: GlobalModulatorContainer Signal
nodes.description: Downsampled modulation signal from a modulator in the GlobalModulatorContainer, received via runtime_target connection

nodes.label: Index
nodes.description: Selects which modulator slot (0-16) to read from the GlobalModulatorContainer

nodes.label: Rate Matching
nodes.description: Linear interpolation to upsample control-rate signal to audio rate (when needed)

nodes.label: Apply Modulation
nodes.description: Applies the selected mode formula (Gain/Unipolar/Bipolar) with Value and Intensity to the raw modulation signal

nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Base value for the modulation formula (center point or ceiling)

nodes.label: Mode
nodes.description: Selects modulation formula: Gain, Unipolar, or Bipolar

nodes.label: Intensity
nodes.description: Modulation depth (-1 to 1); negative values invert modulation

nodes.label: ProcessSignal
nodes.description: When enabled, writes modulation signal to audio channel 0

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Normalised modulation value (0-1) sent to connected parameter targets

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Audio channel 0 output (only active when ProcessSignal is enabled)

nodes.label: Display Buffer
nodes.description: Ring buffer for ModPlotter visualisation (downsampled by factor 32)
